title: seriphidium caerulescens var. gallicum
intro: Seriphidium caerulescens var. gallicum, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a plant species in the genus Seriphidium, which belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is native to Europe and Asia, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal and health-promoting properties. The plant contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of Mountain Everlasting can be used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to support cardiovascular health, while also offering anti-cancer and anti-inflammatory properties.
